features.name: Chord Viewer
features.description: Visualizes weighted relationships between entities as a chord diagram, with row-source selection and collaborative filtering.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, demo, help page, and three changelog entries all share the 'Chord' name root.

features.name: Globe Viewer
features.description: Renders geospatial data on an interactive 3D globe with filtering and row-source support.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, help page, and the Globe-specific changelog fix share the same name root.

features.name: Radar Viewer
features.description: Plots multivariate data across several axes in a spider/radar chart with configurable column labels and legend.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, demo, help page, and six changelog entries all reference 'Radar' by name.

features.name: Sankey Viewer
features.description: Depicts flow between sets of values as a Sankey diagram with color-coding for nodes and links.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, demo, and three Sankey-labeled changelog entries form a clear naming cluster.

features.name: Sunburst Viewer
features.description: Displays hierarchical data as a multi-ring sunburst chart with collaborative filtering and molecule rendering support.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, demo, and six Sunburst-labeled changelog entries share the same name root.

features.name: Surface Plot Viewer
features.description: Renders three-dimensional numeric datasets as an interactive mesh surface plot.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, demo, and help page all reference 'Surface plot' / 'surface-plot'.

features.name: Timelines Viewer
features.description: Displays sequences of events along a time axis with a range slider and configurable legend colors.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, demo, help page, and two Timelines-tagged changelog entries share the same name root.

features.name: Multiplot Viewer
features.description: Combines multiple chart series in a single synchronized view for comparative multi-variable analysis.
features.evidence_summary: Single viewer function with the 'Multiplot' name; no demo, doc, or changelog entries present in this snapshot.

features.name: Group Analysis Viewer
features.description: Visualizes statistical summaries and comparisons across user-defined row groups to support exploratory analysis.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function and help page share the 'Group Analysis' name.

features.name: Word Cloud Viewer
features.description: Renders unstructured text data as a word cloud where word size reflects frequency.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, demo, and help page all reference 'Word cloud' / 'word-cloud'.

features.name: Tree Viewer
features.description: Visualizes hierarchical categorical data as an interactive tree with standard and radial layout options, Ctrl+Click branch selection, and collaborative filtering.
features.evidence_summary: Viewer function, demo, help page, and nine changelog entries all reference the 'Tree' viewer.

features.name: Flag Cell Renderer
features.description: Renders country/region flag icons in grid cells; the paired semantic-type detector auto-identifies columns eligible for flag display.
features.evidence_summary: The flagCellRenderer and the anonymous semTypeDetector are co-registered infrastructure functions: the detector identifies suitable columns and the renderer displays flag icons.
